<?php namespace MailerSend\Endpoints; use Assert\Assertion; use MailerSend\Common\Constants; use MailerSend\Helpers\GeneralHelpers; class Template extends AbstractEndpoint { protected string $endpoint = 'templates'; /** * @throws \Psr\Http\Client\ClientExceptionInterface * @throws \MailerSend\Exceptions\MailerSendAssertException * @throws \JsonException */ public function getAll(?string $domainId = null, ?int $page = null, ?int $limit = Constants::DEFAULT_LIMIT): array { if ($limit) { GeneralHelpers::assert( fn () => Assertion::range( $limit, Constants::MIN_LIMIT, Constants::MAX_LIMIT, 'Limit is supposed to be between ' . Constants::MIN_LIMIT . ' and ' . Constants::MAX_LIMIT . '.' ) ); } return $this->httpLayer->get( $this->buildUri($this->endpoint, [ 'domain_id' => $domainId, 'page' => $page, 'limit' => $limit, ]) ); } /** * @throws \Psr\Http\Client\ClientExceptionInterface * @throws \JsonException * @throws \MailerSend\Exceptions\MailerSendAssertException */ public function find(string $templateId): array { GeneralHelpers::assert( fn () => Assertion::minLength($templateId, 1, 'Template id is required.') ); return $this->httpLayer->get( $this->buildUri("$this->endpoint/$templateId") ); } /** * @throws \Psr\Http\Client\ClientExceptionInterface * @throws \JsonException * @throws \MailerSend\Exceptions\MailerSendAssertException */ public function delete(string $templateId): array { GeneralHelpers::assert( fn () => Assertion::minLength($templateId, 1, 'Template id is required.') ); return $this->httpLayer->delete( $this->buildUri("$this->endpoint/$templateId") ); } }
